name: GODAI RANSATSU: YONDAN JUTSU (ELEMENTAL DESTRUCTION: RANK FOUR TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (*)

Rank: 14

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

This technique works like Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu, except you fire a ray of concentrated elemental power, dealing 12d6 damage of the appropriate type if it hits. This technique has the following variants, each of which requires you have learned at least 6 techniques of its subtype.

- Dendousoku no Jutsu (Raiton) [Electric]: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the ray's attack roll.
- Karyuu Entou no Jutsu (Katon) [Fire]: The target catches on fire (Reflex negates).
- Shingen no Jutsu (Doton) [Earth]: Applies @Condition[stunned;duration=1]{stunned} to the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates).
- Shippuken (Fuuton) [Wind]: Applies @Condition[deaf;duration=1]{deafened} to the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates).
- Shiroiyari no Jutsu (Hyouton) [Cold]: Applies @Condition[staggered;duration=1]{staggered} to the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates).
- Suitoudai no Jutsu (Suiton) [Water]: Applies @Condition[dazzled;duration=1]{dazzled} to the target for 1 round (Reflex negates).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).
